content: GitHub Actions windows-latest runners have PowerShell preinstalled with Microsoft.PowerShell.Archive's Expand-Archive cmdlet. Expand-Archive validates the .zip file extension and will reject non-.zip extensions (e.g. .ccx) with 'is not a supported archive file format'. Workaround: rename to .zip first, or use [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::ExtractToDirectory() (.NET, available in PowerShell, not extension-gated).
